query: When was the journey 'Birthday Message' published?
gold_sql:
SELECT name AS campaign_name,
       lastdeployedtime AS published_time
FROM dim_campaign
WHERE name IN ('Birthday Message', 'Gold Tier Welcome Email')
LIMIT 50
search_text: When was the journey 'Birthday Message' published? route SQL_PLUS_API intent time_lookup domain journey tables dim_campaign endpoints GET /ajo/journey params filter

query: Give me inactive journeys
gold_sql:
SELECT J.CAMPAIGNID AS campaign_id,
       J.NAME AS campaign_name,
       J.STATE AS campaign_state,
       J.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time
FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS J
WHERE LOWER(J.STATE) NOT IN ('deployed', 'redeployed')
LIMIT 50
search_text: Give me inactive journeys route SQL_PLUS_API intent status_lookup domain journey tables dim_campaign endpoints GET /ajo/journey params filter

query: List all journeys
gold_sql:
SELECT CAMPAIGN.NAME AS CAMPAIGNNAME,
       CAMPAIGN.CAMPAIGNID
FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS CAMPAIGN
LIMIT 10
search_text: List all journeys route SQL_PLUS_API intent list domain journey tables dim_campaign endpoints GET /ajo/journey params pageSize

query: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'SMS Opt-In', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.
gold_sql:
SELECT 
    a.segmentid AS segment_id,
    a.name AS segment_name,
    a.totalmembers AS total_profiles,
    a.createdTime AS created_time,
    a.updatedTime AS updated_time
FROM dim_segment a
JOIN hkg_br_segment_target ad ON a.segmentid = ad.segmentid
JOIN dim_target d ON ad.targetId = d.targetId
WHERE d.dataflowName = 'SMS Opt-In'
ORDER BY a.name
search_text: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'SMS Opt-In', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results. route SQL_PLUS_API_CHAIN intent count domain segment tables dim_segment dim_target hkg_br_segment_target endpoints GET /data/core/ups/audiences GET /data/foundation/flowservice/flows params limit property

query: Show me the IDs of failed dataflow runs
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT S.DATAFLOWID AS dataflow_id
FROM DIM_CONNECTOR AS S
WHERE S.STATE ILIKE '%loyalty%'
LIMIT 50
search_text: Show me the IDs of failed dataflow runs route SQL_PLUS_API intent status_lookup domain dataflow tables dim_connector endpoints GET /data/foundation/flowservice/flows params filter limit

query: Export a list of all destinations in the b2b-prod sandbox, sorted by most recently modified, including all columns associated with each destination, and include the 'modified' column for validation.
gold_sql:
SELECT D.targetId AS target_id,
       D.dataflowName AS dataflow_name,
       D.name AS target_name,
       D.description,
       D.state,
       D.connectionSpecId AS connection_spec_id,
       D.createdTime AS created_time,
       D.updatedTime AS modified,
       D.interval,
       D.frequency
FROM dim_target AS D
ORDER BY D.updatedTime DESC
LIMIT 50
search_text: Export a list of all destinations in the b2b-prod sandbox, sorted by most recently modified, including all columns associated with each destination, and include the 'modified' column for validation. route SQL_PLUS_API intent time_lookup domain destination tables dim_target endpoints GET /data/foundation/flowservice/flows params limit property sort

query: How many datasets have been ingested using the same schema in the prod sandbox?
gold_sql:
SELECT S.blueprintid AS blueprint_id,
       S.name AS blueprint_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) AS collection_count
FROM dim_collection AS D
JOIN hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS DS ON D.collectionid = DS.collectionid
JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON DS.blueprintid = S.blueprintid
GROUP BY S.blueprintid,
         S.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) > 1
search_text: How many datasets have been ingested using the same schema in the prod sandbox? route SQL_PLUS_API_CHAIN intent count domain schema tables dim_blueprint dim_collection hkg_br_blueprint_collection endpoints GET /data/foundation/catalog/dataSets GET /data/foundation/schemaregistry/tenant/schemas/{schema_id} params limit property

query: List all datasets that use the schema 'hkg_adls_profile_count_history'.

api_calls.raw: GET /data/foundation/catalog/dataSets?limit=3&filter=schemaName=="WF HEMI Account Attribute Retail Fiserv Schema"

params.filter: schemaName=="WF HEMI Account Attribute Retail Fiserv Schema"

gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT D.collectionid AS collection_id,
       D.name AS collection_name
FROM hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS SD
JOIN dim_collection AS D ON SD.collectionid = D.collectionid
JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON SD.blueprintid = S.blueprintid
WHERE S.name = 'hkg_adls_profile_count_history'
LIMIT 3
gold_api: GET /data/foundation/catalog/dataSets?limit=3&filter=schemaName=="WF HEMI Account Attribute Retail Fiserv Schema"
search_text: List all datasets that use the schema 'hkg_adls_profile_count_history'. route SQL_PLUS_API_CHAIN intent list domain schema tables dim_blueprint dim_collection hkg_br_blueprint_collection endpoints GET /data/foundation/catalog/dataSets GET /data/foundation/schemaregistry/tenant/schemas/{schema_id} params filter limit

query: show me the field for Person: Birthday Today 001
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aa.property AS property_name, a.name AS segment_name
FROM hkg_br_segment_property aa
JOIN dim_segment a ON aa.segmentid = a.segmentid
WHERE a.name = 'Person: Birthday Today 001'
LIMIT 20
search_text: show me the field for Person: Birthday Today 001 route SQL_PLUS_API intent field_lookup domain dataset tables dim_segment hkg_br_segment_property endpoints GET /data/foundation/catalog/datasets params filter limit

query: Provide more details for the schema 'weRetail: Customer Actions'
gold_sql:
SELECT S.BLUEPRINTID AS blueprint_id,
       S.NAME,
       S.CLASS,
       S.ISPROFILEENABLED,
       S.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time,
       S.REQUIREDFIELDS AS required_fields,
       COUNT(DISTINCT SD.COLLECTIONID) AS collection_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT SA.PROPERTY) AS property_count
FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S
LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_COLLECTION AS SD ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SD.BLUEPRINTID
LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_PROPERTY AS SA ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SA.BLUEPRINTID
WHERE LOWER(S.NAME) = LOWER('weRetail: Customer Actions')
GROUP BY S.BLUEPRINTID,
         S.NAME,
         S.CLASS,
         S.ISPROFILEENABLED,
         S.UPDATEDTIME,
         S.REQUIREDFIELDS
LIMIT 3
search_text: Provide more details for the schema 'weRetail: Customer Actions' route SQL_PLUS_API intent lookup domain schema tables dim_blueprint hkg_br_blueprint_collection hkg_br_blueprint_property endpoints GET /schemas params filter limit

query: Count the number of XDM Experience Event schemas that are enabled for profile.
gold_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.BLUEPRINTID) AS num_experience_event_profile_enabled_blueprints
FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S
WHERE LOWER(S.CLASS) LIKE LOWER('%download%')
  AND S.ISPROFILEENABLED = TRUE
search_text: Count the number of XDM Experience Event schemas that are enabled for profile. route SQL_PLUS_API intent count domain schema tables dim_blueprint endpoints GET /data/foundation/schemaregistry/tenant/schemas params filter limit

query: How many schemas do I have?
gold_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.blueprintid) AS blueprint_count
FROM dim_blueprint AS S
search_text: How many schemas do I have? route SQL_PLUS_API intent count domain schema tables dim_blueprint endpoints GET /schemas params limit

query: List all audiences in the sandbox that have been mapped to new destinations in the last 3 months.
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT A.segmentid AS segment_id, A.name AS segment_name, D.targetId AS target_id, D.name AS target_name
FROM dim_segment AS A
JOIN hkg_br_segment_target AS AD ON A.segmentid = AD.segmentid
JOIN dim_target AS D ON AD.targetId = D.targetId
WHERE D.createdTime >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
LIMIT 3
search_text: List all audiences in the sandbox that have been mapped to new destinations in the last 3 months. route SQL_PLUS_API intent list domain segment tables dim_segment dim_target hkg_br_segment_target endpoints GET /data/foundation/audit/events params limit property

query: Show recent changes in datasets.
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT D.COLLECTIONID AS collection_id,
       D.NAME AS collection_name,
       D.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time
FROM DIM_COLLECTION AS D
WHERE D.UPDATEDTIME >= DATEADD(DAY, -90, CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY D.UPDATEDTIME DESC
LIMIT 50
search_text: Show recent changes in datasets. route SQL_PLUS_API intent time_lookup domain dataset tables dim_collection endpoints GET /audit/events params limit orderBy property

query: Show me all entities created by download

FROM dim_collection
WHERE createdby ILIKE '%download%'
LIMIT 20
search_text: Show me all entities created by download route SQL_PLUS_API intent time_lookup domain dataset tables dim_collection endpoints GET /data/foundation/audit/events params limit property
